mapper.select: SELECT ANIMAL_ID AS animalId, ANIMAL_NAME AS animalName, CATEGORY AS category, PARENT_ID AS parentId FROM ANIMAL_TYPE ORDER BY NVL( PARENT_ID, ANIMAL_ID ), CASE WHEN PARENT_ID IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, ANIMAL_ID
SELECT SERVICE_ID AS serviceId, SERVICE_NAME AS serviceName FROM MEDICAL_SERVICE ORDER BY SERVICE_ID
SELECT SUBJECT_ID AS subjectId, SUBJECT_NAME AS subjectName FROM MEDICAL_SUBJECT ORDER BY SUBJECT_ID
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_HOSPITAL_OWNER_REQUEST.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO HOSPITAL_OWNER_REQUEST (
REQUEST_ID, MEMBER_ID, HOSPITAL_ID,
APPLICANT_NAME, BUSINESS_NUMBER, DOCUMENT_URL,
HOSPITAL_NAME, HOSPITAL_PHONE, HOSPITAL_ADDRESS, HOSPITAL_DETAIL_ADDRESS, HOSPITAL_DISTRICT, HOSPITAL_WEBSITE_URL,
HOSPITAL_LATITUDE, HOSPITAL_LONGITUDE,
HOSPITAL_OPEN_TIME, HOSPITAL_CLOSE_TIME, HOSPITAL_BREAK_TIME, HOSPITAL_CLOSED_DAYS,
HOSPITAL_MEDICAL_SUBJECTS, HOSPITAL_DOCTOR_INFO,
HOSPITAL_DESCRIPTION, HOSPITAL_IMAGE_URL, HOSPITAL_NOTE,
STATUS, RESULT_READ_YN, CREATED_AT
) VALUES (
#{requestId}, #{memberId}, NULL,
#{applicantName}, #{businessNumber}, #{documentUrl},
#{hospitalName}, #{hospitalPhone}, #{hospitalAddress}, #{hospitalDetailAddress}, #{hospitalDistrict}, #{hospitalWebsiteUrl},
#{hospitalLatitude}, #{hospitalLongitude},
#{hospitalOpenTime}, #{hospitalCloseTime}, #{hospitalBreakTime}, #{hospitalClosedDays},
#{hospitalMedicalSubjects}, #{hospitalDoctorInfo},
#{hospitalDescription}, #{hospitalImageUrl}, #{hospitalNote},
'PENDING', 'N', SYSTIMESTAMP
)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM HOSPITAL_OWNER_REQUEST WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND STATUS = 'PENDING'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM HOSPITAL_OWNER_REQUEST WHERE REPLACE( BUSINESS_NUMBER, '-', '' ) = REPLACE( #{businessNumber}, '-', '' ) AND STATUS IN ( 'PENDING', 'APPROVED' )

SELECT REQUEST_ID AS requestId, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId,
APPLICANT_NAME AS applicantName, BUSINESS_NUMBER AS businessNumber,
HOSPITAL_NAME AS hospitalName, HOSPITAL_PHONE AS hospitalPhone, HOSPITAL_ADDRESS AS hospitalAddress,
STATUS AS status, REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason, RESULT_READ_YN AS resultReadYn,
CREATED_AT AS createdAt, PROCESSED_AT AS processedAt, PROCESSED_BY AS processedBy
FROM HOSPITAL_OWNER_REQUEST
WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM HOSPITAL_OWNER_REQUEST
WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
AND STATUS IN ( 'APPROVED', 'REJECTED' )
AND NVL( RESULT_READ_YN, 'N' ) = 'N'

SELECT REQUEST_ID AS requestId, MEMBER_ID AS memberId,
APPLICANT_NAME AS applicantName, BUSINESS_NUMBER AS businessNumber, DOCUMENT_URL AS documentUrl,
HOSPITAL_NAME AS hospitalName, HOSPITAL_PHONE AS hospitalPhone, HOSPITAL_ADDRESS AS hospitalAddress, HOSPITAL_DETAIL_ADDRESS AS hospitalDetailAddress, HOSPITAL_DISTRICT AS hospitalDistrict, HOSPITAL_WEBSITE_URL AS hospitalWebsiteUrl,
HOSPITAL_LATITUDE AS hospitalLatitude, HOSPITAL_LONGITUDE AS hospitalLongitude,
HOSPITAL_OPEN_TIME AS hospitalOpenTime, HOSPITAL_CLOSE_TIME AS hospitalCloseTime, HOSPITAL_BREAK_TIME AS hospitalBreakTime, HOSPITAL_CLOSED_DAYS AS hospitalClosedDays,
HOSPITAL_DOCTOR_INFO AS hospitalDoctorInfo, HOSPITAL_DESCRIPTION AS hospitalDescription, HOSPITAL_IMAGE_URL AS hospitalImageUrl, HOSPITAL_NOTE AS hospitalNote,
STATUS AS status
FROM HOSPITAL_OWNER_REQUEST WHERE REQUEST_ID = #{requestId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND STATUS = 'PENDING'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM HOSPITAL_OWNER_REQUEST WHERE REPLACE(BUSINESS_NUMBER,'_','') =REPLACE(#{businessNumber},'_','') AND REQUEST_ID != #{requestId} AND STATUS IN ('PENDING' , 'APPROVED')
mapper.update:
UPDATE HOSPITAL_OWNER_REQUEST SET APPLICANT_NAME = #{applicantName}, BUSINESS_NUMBER = #{businessNumber}, DOCUMENT_URL = #{documentUrl},
HOSPITAL_NAME = #{hospitalName}, HOSPITAL_PHONE = #{hospitalPhone}, HOSPITAL_ADDRESS = #{hospitalAddress}, HOSPITAL_DETAIL_ADDRESS = #{hospitalDetailAddress}, HOSPITAL_DISTRICT = #{hospitalDistrict}, HOSPITAL_WEBSITE_URL = #{hospitalWebsiteUrl},
HOSPITAL_LATITUDE = #{hospitalLatitude}, HOSPITAL_LONGITUDE = #{hospitalLongitude},
HOSPITAL_OPEN_TIME = #{hospitalOpenTime}, HOSPITAL_CLOSE_TIME = #{hospitalCloseTime}, HOSPITAL_BREAK_TIME = #{hospitalBreakTime}, HOSPITAL_CLOSED_DAYS = #{hospitalClosedDays},
HOSPITAL_MEDICAL_SUBJECTS = #{hospitalMedicalSubjects}, HOSPITAL_DOCTOR_INFO = #{hospitalDoctorInfo}, HOSPITAL_DESCRIPTION = #{hospitalDescription}, HOSPITAL_IMAGE_URL = #{hospitalImageUrl}, HOSPITAL_NOTE = #{hospitalNote}
WHERE REQUEST_ID = #{requestId} AND MEMBER_ID =#{memberId} AND STATUS = 'PENDING'

UPDATE HOSPITAL_OWNER_REQUEST
SET RESULT_READ_YN = 'Y'
WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
AND STATUS IN ( 'APPROVED', 'REJECTED' )
AND NVL( RESULT_READ_YN, 'N' ) = 'N'
